query: UPDATE videos SET status = 'failed', error_message = 'Pipeline stuck - expired by admin', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status IN ('generating_voiceover', 'generating_visuals', 'composing', 'uploading') AND updated_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE);
